options.name: --version
options.description:
Show version of ICSharpCode.Decompiler
used.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --outputdir
options.description:
The output directory, if omitted
decompiler output is written to
standard out.

options.name: --project
options.description:
Decompile assembly as compilable
project. This requires the output
directory option.

options.name: --type
options.description:
The fully qualified name of the type
to decompile.

options.name: --ilcode
options.description: Show IL code.

options.name: --il-sequence-points
options.description: Show IL with sequence points. Implies

options.name: --generate-pdb
options.description: Generate PDB.

options.name: --use-varnames-from-pdb
options.description: Use variable names from PDB.

options.name: --list
options.description:
Lists all entities of the specified
type(s). Valid types: c(lass),
i(nterface), s(truct), d(elegate),
e(num)

options.name: --languageversion
options.description:
C# Language version: CSharp1, CSharp2,
CSharp3, CSharp4, CSharp5, CSharp6,
CSharp7, CSharp7_1, CSharp7_2,
CSharp7_3, CSharp8_0, CSharp9_0,
CSharp10_0, CSharp11_0, CSharp12_0,
CSharp13_0, Preview or Latest
Allowed values are: CSharp1, CSharp2,
CSharp3, CSharp4, CSharp5, CSharp6,
CSharp7, CSharp7_1, CSharp7_2,
CSharp7_3, CSharp8_0, CSharp9_0,
CSharp10_0, CSharp11_0, CSharp12_0,
CSharp13_0, CSharp14_0, Preview,
Latest.
Default value is: Latest.

options.name: --ilspy-settingsfile
options.description: Path to an ILSpy settings file.

options.name: --decompiler-setting
options.description:
Set a decompiler setting. Use multiple
times to set multiple settings.

options.name: --referencepath
options.description:
Path to a directory containing
dependencies of the assembly that is
being decompiled.

options.name: --no-dead-code
options.description: Remove dead code.

options.name: --no-dead-stores
options.description: Remove dead stores.

options.name: --dump-package
options.description:
Dump package assemblies into a folder.
This requires the output directory
option.

options.name: --nested-directories
options.description: Use nested directories for namespaces.

options.name: --disable-updatecheck
options.description:
If using ilspycmd in a tight loop or
fully automated scenario, you might
want to disable the automatic update
check.

options.name: --generate-diagrammer
options.description:
Generates an interactive HTML
diagrammer app from selected types in
the target assembly - to the
--outputdir or in a 'diagrammer'
folder next to to the assembly by
default.

options.name: --generate-diagrammer-include
options.description:
An optional regular expression
matching Type.FullName used to
whitelist types to include in the
generated diagrammer.

options.name: --generate-diagrammer-exclude
options.description:
An optional regular expression
matching Type.FullName used to
blacklist types to exclude from the
generated diagrammer.

options.name: --generate-diagrammer-report-excluded
options.description:
Outputs a report of types excluded
from the generated diagrammer -
whether by default because
compiler-generated, explicitly by
'--generate-diagrammer-exclude' or
implicitly by
'--generate-diagrammer-include'. You
may find this useful to develop and
debug your regular expressions.

options.name: --generate-diagrammer-docs
options.description:
The path or file:// URI of the XML
file containing the target assembly's
documentation comments. You only need
to set this if a) you want your
diagrams annotated with them and b)
the file name differs from that of the
assmbly. To enable XML documentation
output for your assmbly, see
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp/language-reference/xmldoc/#create-xml-documentation-output

options.name: --generate-diagrammer-strip-namespaces
options.description:
Optional space-separated namespace
names that are removed for brevity
from XML documentation comments. Note
that the order matters: e.g. replace
'System.Collections' before 'System'
to remove both of them completely.
Remarks:
-o is valid with every option and required when using -p.
